name: Dragonscales
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent as Neutral this Reincarnation. Effect is ×10 on Stone Pillars, Labyrinths and Hall of Legends.
formula: ((x / 60) ^ 0.5)%, ×10 on Stone Pillars/Labyrinths/HoL; x = Neutral time this Reincarnation

name: Iron Flight
effect: Increase production of Iron Stronghold by 200% per spell currently affecting it.
formula: ×200% per active spell effect on Iron Stronghold

name: Imposing Presence
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively based on Neutral buildings owned.
formula: +(0.5 * x ^ 0.5), where x = Neutral buildings owned

name: Dragonborn
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively, and their production, based on total time spent with Dragons (All Time).
formula: Additive: +(50 * x ^ 0.5); Mult: (0.5 * x ^ 0.25)%; Prod: (0.7 * x ^ 0.3)%; x = Dragons time (All Time)

name: Bountiful Hoard
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Artifacts found.

name: Sharp Claws
effect: Multiplicatively increase Royal Exchange bonus and Faction Coin find chance based on clicks made this Era.
formula: (0.8 * x ^ 0.35)%, where x = clicks this Era

name: Ancient Hunger
effect: Increase Maximum Mana additively and multiplicatively based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: Additive: +(20 * ln(1+x)^2); Mult: (0.75 * ln(1+x)^1.25)%; x = FC found this Era

name: Eternal Wisdom
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Royal Exchange bonus.
formula: (1.5 * x ^ 0.95)%, where x = individual Royal Exchange bonus

name: Chromatic Scales
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on active Dragon's Breath effects.
formula: (100 * x ^ 2)%, where x = active Dragon's Breath effects

name: Dragon Union / Proof
effect: Alignment-based bonus. Order: all buildings from Order time. Chaos: Unique/Non-Unique buildings from assistants (target alternates by FC chance). Balance: Max Mana from Lineage level.

name: Fang Food
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration and Assistants based on highest Dragon Pastures built this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.5 * x ^ 0.5)%, where x = highest Dragon Pastures this Reincarnation

name: Wyrm's Rest
effect: Remove 1 Ascension penalty from Royal Exchange bonus. White Breath also multiplicatively increases Assistants based on Dragon time this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.25 * ln(1+x)^1.25)%, where x = Dragon time this Reincarnation

name: Draconic Supremacy
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.
